title: pavonia ekmanii
intro: Pavonia ekmanii is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the rockrose or rosemallow. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Pavonia ekmanii is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
